item.title: I am so happy I don’t have the mind virus of heterosexuality and have to deal with people like this - both expressive and intern...
item.description:
I am so happy I don’t have the mind virus of heterosexuality and have to deal with people like this - both expressive and internal misogyny requiring us to wait into the nonsensical discussion that the Manosphere forces every point into#greenscreenvideo

item.title: I’m sorry to do a little bit of theory broing but it does genuinely matter, this is not a new phenomenon and as the coloniser lo...
item.description:
I’m sorry to do a little bit of theory broing but it does genuinely matter, this is not a new phenomenon and as the coloniser loses its identity as such it loses the battle that it is waging#greenscreenvideo

item.title: Do not fall for this illusion that we can do anything just by airstrikes
